prompt: We need a regulatory compliance overlay that can be attached to any architecture artifact. Our financial services org requires DORA compliance evidence, and we keep finding that architects mention compliance but don't actually map controls to their designs.

assertions.text: Contains kind field set to 'profile' or 'overlay'
kind is 'overlay' (not profile — this is a cross-cutting concern)
Inherits from EAROS-CORE-001 via an 'inherits' field
Contains a dimensions array with at least 1 entry
At least one criterion uses a gate (gate.enabled: true or gate with severity)
Contains 'outputs' section with require_evidence_refs, require_confidence, require_actions
artifact_type is 'any' (overlays apply to all artifact types)
